title: KPI strip
description: Horizontal strip of 1-4 metric cards: big number + label + optional delta/period. Mirrors the kpi_strip layout contract from layouts.py.

props.name: kpis
props.description: Metric cards: [{number, label, color?, delta?, period?}]. Max 4 (clamped — at 5+ cards text overflows, see F-05 guard from layouts.py).

props.name: columns
props.description: Column count override. null = len(kpis). Clamped to [1,4].
